creator: mandree@FreeBSD.org
text:
Comment on attachment 220336
proof of the dns leak....

Sorry, the issue you are reporting is still not obvious to me. 

It may be to you, but you need to make me able to explain your setup, the problem, and what you would have wanted instead, to the upstream OpenVPN developers.  I am currently unable.  Just imagine I sit in front of a blank sheet of paper and you start explaining to a stupid person.  I haven't been doing your job or setup for hours on end, so I am not in your shoes I'm afraid.

To go forward, could I ask you to please read through all of these two documents
https://www.chiark.greenend.org.uk/~sgtatham/bugs.html
http://www.catb.org/~esr/faqs/smart-questions.html

and then provide the full information.
